name: Mysterium
description: Mysterium is a cooperative deduction game in the spirit of Dixit-meets-Clue — one player is the silent ghost of a murdered manor-resident, communicating only through lavishly painted dream-cards, while up to six psychic players try to interpret each card's surreal imagery as a clue toward a specific suspect, location, and weapon. As the séance progresses across seven rounds, the psychics close in on the truth while the ghost agonizes over which dream best evokes a velvet armchair. Stunningly atmospheric.
